acquisition method: using a data dependent acquisition (DDA) method.
cleavage agent: co-expressing both lipophil- and gland-specific markers (Figures 2C and S4D): fatty acid-binding protein 4 and chymotrypsin, respectively.
fragmentation method: the mass spectrometer was operated in positive ionization mode in DDA, with acquisition in MS1 and MS2 level in Orbitrap mass analyzers.
instrument: analyzed using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer.
labeling: mass spectrometry-based peptide identification for Trichoplax sp. H2 and for H. hongkongensis H13.
